title: tarenna luteola
intro: Tarenna luteola, also known as golden tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tarenna luteola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Tarenna luteola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
